Haneul Renewables Co., Ltd. (Seoul, KR) issues this Privacy and Retention Workflow Notice for employees and investors under PIPA and FSCMA.
We collect PII including name, mobile number, email, and resident registration number when compiling IR contact lists, employment records, and deal‑room access logs.
For FSCMA compliance, insider lists for the contemplated private placement of tokenized REC units (a virtual‑asset pilot adjacent to our wind portfolio) will include role, access time, and unique device IDs.
Such insider lists constitute MNPI and are restricted until KRX fair disclosure or FSC/FSS filing is complete; a blackout window applies from draft term sheet circulation to T+2 after public notice.
Commercial terms under negotiation (e.g., green PPA floor price KRW/MWh and carbon‑credit transfer collar) are MNPI and may not be tipped or selectively disclosed to any investor.
A recent third‑party cyber incident investigation regarding our vendor Orion KeySafe revealed credential resets for two employees; containment reports are not public and are stored in a segregated IR drive.
Processing includes automated monitoring of data‑room downloads and DLP alerts to maintain an information barrier between Treasury and the Virtual Asset Taskforce.
Educational note: the term “insider list” in our onboarding e‑learning is used for training scenarios only and does not relate to a live transaction.
Lawful basis: consent for resident registration number processing under PIPA Art.24‑2, legitimate interests for internal controls, and legal obligation for FSC/FSS inquiries.
Retention: insider list entries and access logs are kept for 5 years from public disclosure; RRN data is hashed with separate key storage and deleted after 3 years unless employment continues.
Cross‑border transfer: if due diligence uses our Singapore data center vendor SeonuCloud APAC, we will obtain separate consent and apply standard contractual safeguards.
DSAR: you may request access, correction, or deletion by contacting the Data Protection Officer, Ms. Han Se‑rin, at privacy@haneul‑renewables.kr or +82‑2‑1234‑5670.
We will respond within 10 business days; for MNPI materials we may defer until public disclosure consistent with FSCMA and KRX fair disclosure rules.
We do not sell personal information; marketing emails about our ESG performance are sent only to opt‑in subscribers and contain no deal‑stage details.
Operations note: the crypto glossary on our website explains virtual‑asset custody terminology for general education and excludes any reference to pending token issuance.
Complaints may be filed with the PIPC in Korea; for internal escalation contact compliance@haneul‑renewables.kr, Attn: Mr. Park Joon‑seo, Compliance Manager.
